title: cephaelis humboldtiana var. ornata
intro: Cephaelis humboldtiana var. ornata, also known as the ornate Ipecacuanha, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the roots of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The medicinal properties of Cephaelis humboldtiana var. ornata include its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve nausea, making it a valuable remedy for digestive issues and as a treatment for opioid overdoses. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues when used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
